allow: Bash(awk BEGIN{open=0; close=0} {for\(i=1;i<=length\($0\);i++\){c=substr\($0,i,1\); if\(c=="{"\)open++; else if\(c=="}"\)close++}} END{print "open:",open," close:",close," diff:",open-close} *)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\mayke\\Desktop\\tabalho eav7\\site wallet\\styles.css" -Raw; $opens = \($content.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '{' }\).Count; $closes = \($content.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '}' }\).Count; Write-Output "opens=$opens closes=$closes diff=$\($opens - $closes\)")

PowerShell($css = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\mayke\\Desktop\\tabalho eav7\\site wallet\\styles.css" -Raw; $opens = \($css.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '{' }\).Count; $closes = \($css.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '}' }\).Count; Write-Output "CSS opens=$opens closes=$closes diff=$\($opens - $closes\)"; $js = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\mayke\\Desktop\\tabalho eav7\\site wallet\\script.js" -Raw; $jo = \($js.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '{' }\).Count; $jc = \($js.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '}' }\).Count; $jpo = \($js.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '\(' }\).Count; $jpc = \($js.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '\)' }\).Count; Write-Output "JS braces opens=$jo closes=$jc diff=$\($jo - $jc\)"; Write-Output "JS parens opens=$jpo closes=$jpc diff=$\($jpo - $jpc\)")
